untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (HTF vs LTF pattern alignment and countertrend filtering) which cannot be fully expressed in single-timeframe indicator conditions. The core concept of 'lower timeframe patterns aligned with higher timeframe trend direction' requires comparative analysis across timeframes that the engine does not support. Specific thresholds for HTF confirmation bars and HTF-to-LTF ratio are also marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source material.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using ADX_14 > 25 to detect trending conditions and SMA_50 crossovers as trend direction proxies. However, this loses the critical multi-timeframe alignment logic and countertrend filtering that defines the signal. A proper implementation would require HTF indicator context and LTF pattern recognition capabilities not available in this single-timeframe rule set.
